title: doorsman.jar
description: A Horror Mod Around Doors that aims to be as weird as possible
body:
**doorsman.jar** is a Horror-ish Mod that aims to be really weird.

**IF YOU HAVE AN IDEA SUBMIT IT TO THE FORM BECAUSE I WILL LIKELY ADD IT!**

You have 1 and a half days to prepare until you enter stage 1. There are 5 stages, each one getting weirder and weirder. After entering stage 5 a cerature will spawn... **The Doorsman**

You can craft weapons, that look like everyday items, but they aren't

The whole fight depends on how well you prepared.

Uncover secrets and survive the loneliness!

The mod also adds a _/worldtime_ command that I mainly used for testing but you can see how old your world is (in ticks)
